items.name_en: Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
New arrival of the 25A series, this suede and leather patch bag is a god-tier design! High-quality suede meets smooth calfskin, texture is maxed out. Quilted pattern + classic double C logo, low-key luxury!!️ Suede × glossy leather, the layering is amazing! Distressed gold chain is adjustable, shoulder/ crossbody/clutch in one bag! Fits phone + lipstick + compact, practical and structured! Versatile and suits everyone! size: 35*24*12cm

specs.rawTitle:
Genuine leather, in stock 25A Suede bag|
New arrival of the 25A series, this suede and leather patch bag is a god-tier design! High-quality suede meets smooth calfskin, texture is maxed out. Quilted pattern + classic double C logo, low-key luxury!!️ Suede × glossy leather, the layering is amazing! Distressed gold chain is adjustable, shoulder/ crossbody/clutch in one bag! Fits phone + lipstick + compact, practical and structured! Versatile and suits everyone! size: 35*24*12cm

items.name_en: Genuine leather, in stock 25s hobo bag
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather, in stock 25s hobo bag
Vintage bronze hardware, sophisticated and classy, cute and adorable. Double chain is adjustable, the little gold coin charm is adorable! Very lightweight, perfect score 💯. Looks small but actually very spacious 👍🏻. Easy to style. size: 25*15*5.5cm 99465

items.name_en: hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
items.name_cn:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm

specs.rawTitle:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm

items.name_en: In stock 💥 Gradient color 🇫🇷🇫🇷🇫🇷 39*42*8cm/3261; Small 35*37*7cm/3260 🆕 New Chanel Black-Silver Gradient! 22 Shopping Bag. Continues the classic quilted pattern and leather chain shoulder strap design. The appearance is simple and focuses on practical functions. The interior has a zip pocket and a removable small bag fixed by spring hooks. The opening is designed with a magnetic snap and a drawstring elastic band, presenting a lazy and casual style. A hollowed-out CHANEL double-C pendant adds a finishing touch. Made of soft and durable original oil-wax leather. The only high-end hardware in the market, the touch is truly invincible, and it is visibly spacious [Okay], it is too suitable as a mom bag, fitness enthusiasts can buy Dimensions:

items.name_en: In Stock 22. Innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, the Chanel Gabrielle bag was born. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its silhouette has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. The delicate and soft body and the hard and structured bottom fully embody Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. Size 20cm

items.name_en: In stock 22k DUMA backpack, women's bag. Fall in love with this calfskin at first sight, this white is worry-free, it's easy to keep clean! The capacity is super impressive~ Pair this with a summer floral dress for an absolutely fairy-like look! It's also super fairy to wear in winter 🧚🏻‍♀️ The key point is: visually, the volume is only slightly larger than a chubby bag, but it's super cute and small on the body, yet the capacity is so impressive. Phone, card holder, water bottle, umbrella, and other small items can all be easily packed in. The front magnetic snap can hold a card holder and keys/lip balm, both fairy and practical! Dimensions: 18×18×12cm

items.name_en: In Stock 22K New Backpack 🖤 AS3662 Patent Leather. Happiness level maxed out 😍 This is a hot item 🔥 The degree of being loved is obvious to all! Waiting for it with bated breath~ Finally got it~ This is simply a blessing for large bag lovers. The space inside is huge, and practicality is super strong 👍 The real thing is truly huge, huge, huge, huge, beautiful. Patent leather has its own luster, not as delicate as sheepskin, but lighter than grained cowhide. Predicted it will be the bag everyone loves this year 👋 It's really , sweet and cool yet retro, this backpack is the center of attention, the patent leather wind of this year, no one can escape 🫶🫶 Simply too addictive! Really explosively good!! (size: 31.5*31*9cm)
